name: Superpowers
tagline: Agentic skills framework and software development methodology.

name: Anthropic Agent Skills

install.manual: Clone the repo and copy individual skills into your project's .claude/skills/ directory, or install via the official Claude plugin marketplace.

install.manual: Copy skills/canvas-design/ from anthropics/skills into your .claude/skills/ directory.

install.manual: Copy skills/docx/ from anthropics/skills into your .claude/skills/ directory.

install.manual: Copy skills/pptx/ from anthropics/skills into your .claude/skills/ directory.

name: UI UX Pro Max
tagline: Design intelligence for building professional UI/UX across multiple platforms.
description: An AI skill that provides design intelligence — 161 reasoning rules, 67 UI styles, and a design-system generator — for building professional UI/UX across Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, and more. Includes a CLI (uipro-cli) for cross-agent install.
author: NextLevelBuilder

install.cursor:
npm install -g uipro-cli
uipro init --ai cursor
install.manual:
npm install -g uipro-cli
uipro init --ai claude        # or --ai cursor | --ai windsurf
uipro init --ai claude --global  # install globally to ~/.claude/skills/

name: Caveman
tagline: Cuts ~75% of output tokens by making the agent talk like caveman.
description: A skill/plugin that compresses agent output (and optionally input) to caveman-style minimal English while preserving technical accuracy. Includes Wenyan mode, terse-commit and one-line-review variants, and a session-level compression tool.
author: Julius Brussee

install.manual: Windows: `irm https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JuliusBrussee/caveman/main/install.ps1 | iex` — auto-detects 30+ agents and installs for each

name: Graphify
tagline: Turn any folder of code, schemas, scripts, docs, or media into a queryable knowledge graph.
description: A coding-assistant skill that ingests app code, SQL schemas, R/shell scripts, papers, images, and videos and exposes them as a unified knowledge graph the agent can query. Distributed as a Python CLI (`graphify`).
author: Safi Shamsi

install.claude_code: uv tool install graphifyy && graphify install
install.manual: Or `pipx install graphifyy && graphify install` / `pip install graphifyy && graphify install`. Windows: `graphify install --platform windows`

description: Skills for idea discovery, cross-model review loops, and experiment automation in ML research — no framework, no lock-in. Installers support selective, group-based skill install (paper-core, lit-search, etc.) instead of all-or-nothing.
author: Yang Ruofeng

install.manual: Run install_aris.sh (or _codex / _copilot / .ps1) — supports --groups, --skills, --exclude, or an interactive checkbox picker.

name: PM Skills Marketplace
tagline: 100+ agentic skills, commands, and plugins for product managers.
description: Nine installable plugins covering the PM lifecycle — discovery, strategy, execution, launch, growth — each bundling related skills and slash commands.
author: Pawel Huryn

name: HTML Anything
tagline: The agentic HTML editor — your local AI agent writes the HTML, you ship it.
description: 75 skills across 9 surfaces (magazine, deck, poster, social post, prototype, data report) for generating and editing HTML with your coding agent, with a sandboxed live preview. Sibling project to Open Design, from the same team.
author: Nexu

install.manual: git clone https://github.com/nexu-io/html-anything && pnpm install

name: Claude Ads
tagline: Claude-first paid-media operations skill across 12 ad platforms.
description: Source-grounded audits, deterministic scoring, and versioned JSON reports for Google, Meta, YouTube, LinkedIn, TikTok, Microsoft, Apple, Amazon, Reddit, Pinterest, Snapchat, and X ad accounts — with capability-gated account changes.
author: Agrici.Daniel

name: Claude Obsidian
tagline: Self-organizing AI second brain for Obsidian + Claude Code.
description: Drop any source in and Claude reads, links, and files it into one connected knowledge graph of plain Markdown you own — an open-source, Obsidian-based alternative to Notion-style AI note-taking, based on Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern.
author: Agrici.Daniel

install.manual: git clone https://github.com/AgriciDaniel/claude-obsidian — see README for plugin install and uninstall steps.

name: browser-act Skills
tagline: Browser automation skills for AI agents — breaks through anti-bot walls, hands off to humans when stuck.
description: Parallel multi-task execution, independent multi-session operation, and isolated multi-account browsing, plus 30+ pre-built site-specific skills (Amazon, Google Maps, YouTube, Reddit, WeChat, Zhihu) generated by the bundled Skill Forge.
author: BrowserAct

install.manual: See docs/installation.md — installs the browser-act and browser-act-skill-forge skills.

name: Baoyu Skills
tagline: 20+ skills from prompt engineer Jim Liu (Baoyu, 宝玉) — install only what you need.
description: A general-purpose skill collection covering writing, translation, and productivity workflows. The README explicitly recommends installing only the skills you need to avoid bulk-install context overhead.
author: Jim Liu (宝玉)

install.manual: See repo README for the Quick Install script (requires Node.js / npx bun).

name: last30days
tagline: An AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, and Polymarket, then synthesizes a grounded summary.
description: Pulls recent discussion and data across social/news/prediction-market sources for a given topic and produces a single grounded, cited summary — useful for trend research and due diligence.
author: Matt Van Horn

install.manual: npx skills add mvanhorn/last30days-skill -g

name: notebooklm-py
tagline: Unofficial Python API and agentic skill for Google NotebookLM.
description: Full programmatic access to NotebookLM's features — including capabilities the web UI doesn't expose — via Python, CLI, and AI agents. Ships a root NotebookLM skill for `npx skills add` discovery.
author: Teng Lin

install.manual: uv tool install "notebooklm-py[browser]"   # or: pipx install "notebooklm-py[browser]"

name: draw.io Skill
tagline: Generate draw.io diagrams from natural language — UML, SysML/MBSE, BPMN, network, C4, and more.
description: 36 tools covering codebase/CI/infra-to-diagram, image-to-editable-diagram, mind maps, build-up animation, and click-through runbooks. Runs from a single SKILL.md — no MCP server or background daemon required.
author: Agents365 AI

install.manual: brew install --cask drawio   # then follow the SKILL.md install steps
